description: A designed White House announcement card in portrait/social format combining a photograph with a text band. The photo shows President Donald Trump standing at a podium fitted with a microphone, wearing a dark navy suit with a purple/violet tie and a U.S. flag lapel pin, looking toward the camera; behind him stand two men in dark suits (one with a red tie), and a U.S. flag and presidential-seal-style emblem are partly visible at the edges. The lower portion has a dark gradient band carrying a small gold pill-shaped label reading 'PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS' and a large white sans-serif headline: 'TrumpRx Adds 600+ New Medications, Delivering on Promise to Put American Patients First.' The White House wordmark with its engraved building icon ('The WHITE HOUSE') appears at the bottom. The design technique is official-branded promotion of a policy initiative ('TrumpRx') framed as a kept campaign promise and an America-First win on drug pricing. Target audience: general public/political base, signaling competence and delivery on prescription-drug costs.
notable_text: PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS | TrumpRx Adds 600+ New Medications, Delivering on Promise to Put American Patients First | The WHITE HOUSE
